channel.title: iDigital
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from iDigital, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tech Newsletter: AI-Powered Scams on the Rise and Healthcare AI Under Scrutiny
item.description: Today's technology briefing covers the growing sophistication of AI-enabled fraud schemes and ongoing questions about whether AI tools are improving outcomes for hospital patients.

item.title: SS Innovations Develops Drone-Deployed Surgical Robot for Combat Zones
item.description: The SSi Vimana Aero is designed to deliver robotic surgical care to injured soldiers in the field. The company is also developing a humanoid surgical system.

item.title: AI Is Spreading in Healthcare, but Evidence of Patient Benefit Remains Limited
item.description: Hospitals are adopting AI for tasks ranging from clinical notes to diagnostics, yet researchers say clear evidence that these tools improve patient outcomes is still lacking.

item.title: Robotics Firm Pudu Raises Nearly $150 Million to Expand Into Industrial Applications
item.description: Pudu Robotics plans to use the funding to advance its embodied AI capabilities, broaden its product lineup, and grow beyond its current focus on service robots.

item.title: GM's Mikell Taylor to Lead Women in Robotics Session at Robotics Summit
item.description: Mikell Taylor, a robotics engineer with 25 years of experience spanning industrial systems and uncrewed underwater vehicles, will headline the Women in Robotics Breakfast event.
